description: New compare:dk command for DK live site comparison pipeline
content:
compare_dk:
  description: "DK live site comparison — extract Storyblok content, fetch sitemap, match URLs, crawl live site, compare content, generate gap report"
  script: "tsx scripts/site-comparison/run-comparison.ts"
  flags: "--dry-run --limit <N> --retry-failed"
  steps: [extract-storyblok-content, fetch-sitemap, match-urls, crawl-live-site, compare-content]
  output_files:
    - apps/migration/data/dk-storyblok-extracted/ (PageContent JSON per page)
    - apps/migration/data/dk-sitemap-urls.json (URL array)
    - apps/migration/data/dk-url-matching.json (matched/liveOnly/storyblokOnly)
    - apps/migration/data/dk-live-crawl/ (PageContent JSON per crawled page)
    - apps/migration/data/dk-gap-report.json (GapReport with summary + discrepancies)
    - apps/migration/logs/dk-gap-report.md (human-readable markdown summary)

description: Site comparison pipeline — 7 scripts in scripts/site-comparison/ for DK live site content comparison
content:
site_comparison_pipeline:
  description: "Offline-first comparison between Storyblok migrated content and live exhausto.dk site"
  directory: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/
  scripts:
    types.ts: "Shared interfaces — PageContent, UrlMatchResult, Discrepancy, GapReport"
    extract-storyblok-content.ts: "Walk pulled story JSON blok tree, extract text/images/links into PageContent"
    fetch-sitemap.ts: "Fetch and parse sitemap XML, normalize URLs, handle sitemap index recursion"
    match-urls.ts: "Bidirectional URL matching — slug dk/path -> live URL, three buckets"
    crawl-live-site.ts: "Playwright headless crawl with rate limiting, retry, resume support"
    compare-content.ts: "Text normalization (whitespace, soft hyphens, NFC), image/link matching, severity classification"
    run-comparison.ts: "Pipeline orchestrator — runs all 5 steps in sequence"
  key_functions:
    extractPageContent: "(story) -> PageContent | null — filters PIM/folders/non-page types"
    extractAllPages: "(stories[]) -> PageContent[] — batch extraction"
    parseSitemapXml: "(xml) -> string[] — extract <loc> URLs from sitemap XML"
    normalizeUrls: "(urls[]) -> string[] — strip trailing slashes, remove query params, URL-decode, deduplicate"
    storyblokSlugToLiveUrl: "(slug) -> URL — strip dk/ prefix, prepend https://www.exhausto.dk/"
    matchUrls: "(sbPages[], liveUrls[]) -> UrlMatchResult — bidirectional matching with PIM exclusion"
    extractPageFromHtml: "(html, url) -> PageContent — cheerio-based HTML parsing of main content"
    crawlPages: "(urls[], options) -> CrawlResult — Playwright crawl with rate limiting + retry"
    normalizeText: "(text) -> string — collapse whitespace, strip soft hyphens, NFC normalize"
    compareText: "(sb[], live[], slug) -> Discrepancy[] — per-paragraph exact match after normalization"
    compareImages: "(sb[], live[], slug) -> Discrepancy[] — match by filename, report alt mismatches"
    compareLinks: "(sb[], live[], slug) -> Discrepancy[] — match by link text, compare paths"
    buildGapReport: "(matchResult, sbPages, livePages) -> GapReport — full comparison with severity counts"
  pim_exclusion_types: [product, product_category, product_catagory, document, software, product_extra]
  non_page_types_skipped: [push_card, link, faq_item, key_facts_item, testimonial_item, news_category, store_locator, header, footer, contact_bubble, Site settings]
  storyblok_story_json_structure: "Root-level fields (NOT nested under story.*): slug, full_slug, uuid, is_folder, content.component, content.body[]"
  richtext_format: "TipTap doc format — paragraph, heading, bullet_list, list_item, image, text nodes; marks: bold, italic, subscript, superscript, link"
  image_formats: [richtext_inline (type:image, attrs.src), asset_field (fieldtype:asset, filename), skip_numeric_refs]
  link_formats: [richtext_mark (href), multilink_field (cached_url), skip_ezlocation_mailto_anchor]
  crawl_config: { rate_limit: 500ms, timeout: 30s, max_retries: 2, backoff: [1s, 3s] }
  severity_classification: { critical: 'page missing or all text absent', warning: 'partial text diff, image missing, link target wrong', info: 'alt mismatch, extra content on one side' }

description: New dependencies added for site comparison scripts
content:
site_comparison_deps:
  fast-xml-parser: "Sitemap XML parsing"
  cheerio: "HTML parsing for live site content extraction"
  playwright: "Headless browser crawling (devDependency)"

description: vitest config now includes scripts/**/*.test.ts; test count increased from 566 to 681
content:
include_patterns: ["tests/**/*.test.ts", "src/**/*.test.ts", "scripts/**/*.test.ts"]
site_comparison_tests:
  total: 115
  files:
    - scripts/site-comparison/types.test.ts (10 tests)
    - scripts/site-comparison/extract-storyblok-content.test.ts (25 tests)
    - scripts/site-comparison/fetch-sitemap.test.ts (16 tests)
    - scripts/site-comparison/match-urls.test.ts (17 tests)
    - scripts/site-comparison/crawl-live-site.test.ts (13 tests)
    - scripts/site-comparison/compare-content.test.ts (34 tests)
total_test_count: 681

description: Site comparison specific pitfalls discovered during implementation
content:
- "Storyblok pulled story JSON has fields at ROOT level (not nested under story.*) — direct access to slug, full_slug, content, is_folder"
- "product_catagory (misspelled) exists in Storyblok alongside product_category — PIM exclusion must check BOTH spellings"
- "URL normalization must reconstruct URL manually after decodeURIComponent — new URL().pathname re-encodes decoded chars"
- "Storyblok CDN URL pattern: //a.storyblok.com/f/{SPACE_ID}/{SIZE_OR_ID}/{HASH}/{FILENAME} — filename is last path segment"
- "Live site images come from cdn.aldes.com, Storyblok from a.storyblok.com — match by filename only, not full URL"
- "Danish text uses soft hyphens (\u00AD) extensively — must strip before text comparison"
- "run-comparison.ts path resolution: __dirname is scripts/site-comparison/, MIGRATION_ROOT is ../.. (apps/migration/), PROJECT_ROOT is ../../.. (workspace root)"

description: DK site comparison baseline data from dry-run
content:
site_comparison_baseline:
  stories_pulled: 605
  dk_stories_extracted: 177
  sitemap_urls: 209
  matched_urls: 20
  live_only_urls: 189
  storyblok_only: 155
  note: "Low match count due to URL structure differences — Storyblok slugs use dk/ prefix path structure while live site has different routing"

description: New key files for site comparison pipeline
content:
- path: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/types.ts
  purpose: "Shared types — PageContent, UrlMatchResult, Discrepancy, GapReport interfaces"
- path: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/extract-storyblok-content.ts
  purpose: "Storyblok content extraction — recursive blok walker, richtext/image/link extraction, PIM filtering"
- path: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/fetch-sitemap.ts
  purpose: "Sitemap fetcher — XML parsing with fast-xml-parser, URL normalization, sitemap index support"
- path: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/match-urls.ts
  purpose: "Bidirectional URL matcher — slug-to-URL mapping, three buckets, PIM exclusion"
- path: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/crawl-live-site.ts
  purpose: "Live site crawler — Playwright + cheerio, rate limiting, retry with backoff, resume support"
- path: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/compare-content.ts
  purpose: "Content comparison engine — text normalization, image/link matching, severity classification, gap report"
- path: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/run-comparison.ts
  purpose: "Pipeline orchestrator — runs all 5 comparison steps in sequence with --dry-run/--limit/--retry-failed flags"
- path: apps/migration/scripts/site-comparison/STORYBLOK-JSON-STRUCTURE.md
  purpose: "Reference guide for actual Storyblok pulled story JSON structure — component types, richtext format, image/link patterns"

description: New site-comparison pipeline added with 10 modules for live site content comparison
content:
site_comparison:
  description: "Live site comparison pipeline — extracts Storyblok content, fetches sitemap, matches URLs, crawls live pages via Playwright, compares content, generates gap reports"
  directory: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/
  pipeline_stages: [extract, sitemap, match, crawl, compare, report]
  entry_point: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/run-comparison.ts
  types_file: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/types.ts
  cli_command: compare-dk

description: New compare-dk CLI command for running live site comparison pipeline
content:
compare_dk:
  description: "Compare Storyblok content against live DK site — runs full pipeline or subset"
  flags: "--country <code> --limit <n> --skip-crawl --verbose --output-dir <path> --stories-dir <path>"
  registered_via: registerCompareCommand (apps/migration/src/site-comparison/cli-compare.ts)
  exit_codes: { 0: pass, 1: fail, 2: error }

description: Site comparison extraction pattern — walks Storyblok story JSON block trees
content:
storyblok_extraction:
  description: "Walk pulled story JSON files, recursively traverse block tree, extract text/images/links"
  file: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/extract-storyblok-content.ts
  functions: [extractPageContent, shouldSkipStory, extractFilename, extractFromDirectory]
  skips_pim: "product, product_category, document, software, product_extra"
  image_pattern: "a.storyblok.com/f/SPACE/WxH/hash/filename.jpg -> extract filename.jpg"
  text_fields: [title, description, subtitle, seo_title, seo_description, headline, intro, summary, label]

description: Sitemap fetcher — regex XML parsing, sitemapindex recursion, URL normalization
content:
sitemap_fetcher:
  file: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/fetch-sitemap.ts
  functions: [parseSitemapXml, normalizeUrl, isSitemapIndex, parseSitemapIndex, validateUrlCount, fetchSitemap]
  url_normalization: "strip trailing slash, remove query params, URL-decode"
  validation: "URL count must be 50-500 (DK sanity check)"
  parser: "Lightweight regex-based (no heavy XML dependency)"

description: URL matcher — bidirectional Storyblok slug to live URL matching with PIM exclusion
content:
url_matcher:
  file: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/match-urls.ts
  functions: [matchUrls, storyblokSlugToLivePath]
  slug_conversion: "dk/loesninger/x -> /loesninger/x; dk/ -> /"
  buckets: [matched, liveOnly, storyblokOnly]
  pim_exclusion: "accepts pimSlugs option to exclude from all buckets"

description: Live site crawler — Playwright headless Chromium with rate limiting and robots.txt
content:
live_crawler:
  file: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/crawl-live-site.ts
  functions: [extractContentFromHtml, crawlUrl, parseRobotsTxt, isPathAllowed, createRateLimiter, crawlUrls]
  constants: [DEFAULT_CRAWLER_CONFIG]
  config: { maxRequestsPerSecond: 2, contentSelector: main, excludeSelectors: [header, footer, nav], pageTimeoutMs: 30000 }
  html_parsing: "Regex-based for testability (no DOM dependency in unit tests)"
  dependency: playwright (chromium)

description: Content comparison engine — text normalization, image/link matching, severity classification
content:
comparison_engine:
  file: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/compare-content.ts
  functions: [normalizeText, comparePage, classifySeverity]
  text_normalization: "collapse whitespace -> strip \u00AD -> Unicode NFC -> trim"
  image_matching: "By filename only (different CDN hosts)"
  severity_rules: { page_missing: critical, text_absent: critical, partial_text_diff: warning, image_missing: warning, alt_mismatch: info, link_mismatch: warning }

description: Gap report generator — JSON + markdown with gate status computation
content:
gap_report_generator:
  file: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/report-generator.ts
  functions: [generateJsonReport, generateMarkdownReport, computeGateStatus]
  gate_logic: "pass if zero critical discrepancies, fail otherwise"
  markdown_sections: [Gate Status, Summary, Discrepancy Details, Triage Results, Remaining Issues]

description: Playwright dependency added for live site crawling
content:
dependencies_added:
  playwright: "Headless browser for crawling live site pages"
  install: "cd apps/migration && npm install playwright && npx playwright install chromium"

description: 10 new key files for site-comparison pipeline
content:
new_key_files:
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/types.ts
    purpose: "Shared interfaces: PageContent, UrlMatchResult, Discrepancy, GapReport, CrawlerConfig, CrawlResult"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/extract-storyblok-content.ts
    purpose: "Walk Storyblok story JSON, extract text/images/links"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/fetch-sitemap.ts
    purpose: "Fetch+parse sitemap.xml with sitemapindex recursion"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/match-urls.ts
    purpose: "Bidirectional slug<->URL matching with PIM exclusion"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/crawl-live-site.ts
    purpose: "Playwright headless crawler with rate limiting and robots.txt"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/compare-content.ts
    purpose: "Content diff engine with severity classification"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/report-generator.ts
    purpose: "JSON+markdown gap report generation"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/run-comparison.ts
    purpose: "Pipeline orchestrator — runs all 6 steps in sequence"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/cli-compare.ts
    purpose: "CLI compare-dk command registration and option parsing"
  - path: apps/migration/src/site-comparison/index.ts
    purpose: "Public re-exports for all site-comparison modules"
